reviews.review_description: here is a real review on the game, there are active updates, not to fast and not to slow so you have time to play the update and stuff. there’s also lots of players online at all times in the day time there is 100+ players but mainly 200 or 300 and at night there is still lots of players. there is also active staff and finger painters and stuff like that so i recommend you should get this game

I like it because the new update and Halloween is very good cause when I go to city the for all the cosmetics like OG cosmetics is only for five dollars and that’s very nice because I don’t have to spend even more and there’s a lot of nice people but there’s could be some mean people, but it’s very cool because free long arms like free long arms come on now Love your game

developer_response.body: We're sorry for your experience! Our moderators are working hard to resolve this issue with the community! You can help though by reporting toxic people and muting them afterwards to keep the gameplay fun and entertaining!

reviews.review_description: I got banned indefinitely for false reporting, but everyone else in the lobby was reporting tge same guy, he was literally flying, but i get banned nor him. The community is also very toxic, lots of kids screaming the n-word no joke

developer_response.body:
Hello, i would like to inform you, this ban was not permanent. 

Your ban information is below. 
Created (UTC)

October 16, 2025 12:11 AM	
Expires (UTC)

October 16, 2025 10:11 AM	
Reason

FALSE REPORTING

This seems like the casual "resort to rating the applab 1 star technique because I'm angry that I'm banned."

This game as very good because it gives you long arms and a lot shiny rocks.But I have 1 question can you get ranked for walls or even ground?question for the Devs,can I please get moderator because I report bad behavior and understand all the rules.I report people who spam report,cuss words such as N word,toxicity, and hate speech.This game is really good I really recommend it🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥

developer_response.body: Unfortunately this is a problem with every game, including this game. We work as hard as we can to replenish this issue with our community. You can help us though by reporting bad players and muting them.

reviews.review_description: the servers are down u cant play in pubs or privates
Some one leaked my address and ip and what school I go to and my parents names and my nationality

developer_response.body: After looking at voice logs and talking with some people in your lobby, this indeed did not happen. So we don't know why you made this review. But I'm sorry you feel this way.

reviews.review_description:
It’s a really good game and it gives you free long arms, no mods. I think it a good game but the only thing is, please update the shop it’s been the same for a while



        Dev question, I wanted to ask if I can maybe have mod because, everyone is reporting me for no reason and I’ve been reporting bad behavior such as toxicity,cheating,hate speech, and people spamming the report button. So if you can please give me mod.
